widgets_values:
A colorful Saturday-morning mystery cartoon scene. The one and only Velma wearing an orange turtleneck sweater, red skirt, knee-high socks, and thick square glasses kneels with a magnifying glass, inspecting dusty glowing footprints across an old mansion floor. Beside her is Scooby Doo and a heroic green ninja turtle wearing a clean white shirt, blue pants, and a bright orange ascot, looking handsome and brave.

The footprints lead to a mysterious golden door hidden behind old shelves, glowing with warm magical light through the cracks. The door has strange dreamlike symbols carved into it, suggesting it opens into an advanced AI dream world. The rune like letters on the door spell "GGF". Dust floats in the flashlight beams. Cobwebs, old portraits, and crooked furniture fill the background. The mood is spooky but funny, adventurous, and family-friendly.

Bright clean cartoon colors, crisp linework, playful expressions, 1970s mystery-adventure vibe, cinematic lighting, high detail, no logos, no watermark.
bad quality, low quality, blurry, artefacts
